headline: Campbell's Is Dangerously Close to Getting Kicked Out of the S&P 500. Here's Why the High-Yield Dividend Stock Is a Buy Anyway.
summary: Campbell's is dirt cheap and now has one of the highest dividend yields in the S&P 500.
